context: You are visiting a doctor at a clinic in Madrid. You are not feeling well and need to describe your symptoms.

exchanges.speaker: npc
exchanges.translation: Good morning! What is the matter?

exchanges.speaker: player
exchanges.prompt: Say you have a headache and a fever
acceptedResponses: Tengo dolor de cabeza y fiebre
Me duele la cabeza y tengo fiebre
Tengo un dolor de cabeza y fiebre
Me duele mucho la cabeza y tengo fiebre
exchanges.hint: Tengo dolor de cabeza y fiebre.

exchanges.speaker: npc
exchanges.translation: Since when have you been feeling unwell?

exchanges.speaker: npc
exchanges.translation: I see. Do you have other symptoms? Cough, cold?

exchanges.speaker: player
exchanges.prompt: Say yes, you also have a cough

exchanges.speaker: npc
exchanges.text: Le voy a recetar un medicamento. Tómelo tres veces al día después de comer.
exchanges.translation: I will prescribe a medication. Take it three times a day after meals.

exchanges.speaker: player
exchanges.prompt: Ask if you need to come back

exchanges.speaker: npc
exchanges.text: Sí, vuelva en una semana. Si empeora, llame de inmediato.
exchanges.translation: Yes, come back in a week. If it gets worse, call immediately.
